title: GroundingTrace
description: Schema for a grounding trace log entry produced per study run or QA step.

trace_id.description: Unique identifier for this trace entry (UUID or auto-increment string)

study_run_id.description: Foreign key to the study_runs table

qa_verdict.description: QA verdict if event_type is qa_result, otherwise null

payload.description: Arbitrary JSON payload specific to the event type

is_placeholder.description: True if this trace was generated by placeholder/simulated logic, not real AI
